THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RYAN, KEVIN B. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1356-B POTRERO, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $1,377.63 RENT, $700.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,077.63, IF DEFT MAKES PAYMENTS PER STIPULATION, EVICTION SHALL BE FURTHER STAYED; SEE JUDGMENT FOR PAYMENT SCHEDULE. IF ALL PMTS TIMELY MADE, PLTF SHALL COOPERATE WITH DEFT IN HAVING JUDGMENT SET ASIDE & COMPLAINT DISMISSED W/PREJUDICE.
